---
title: 'Part 1: District EV prevalence'
subtitle: '1A: Descriptive'
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}

pacman::p_load(tidyverse, here, gtsummary, sf, spdep, patchwork)
theme_set(theme_minimal())

source(here("R/config.R"))
figdir <- here("figures",country,"descriptive/afp")
plotdir <- here("figures",country,"descriptive/afp/plotobj")

# NP-AFP analysis data
data <- readRDS(here(dir, "analysis/prevalence/afp_analysis.rds"))

# Shapefiles and adjacency matrix
shape2 <- readRDS(here(dir,"shape2.rds"))

```

## Table 1

```{r}

data |> 
  tbl_summary(include = c(n_afp, n_npafp, polis_npafp_rate, n_ev, ev_afp_p),
              by = year,
              label = list(n_afp = "AFP notifications per month", 
                           n_npafp = "Non-polio AFP notifications per month", 
                           polis_npafp_rate = "12m non-polio AFP rate (per 100,000 U15s)", 
                           n_ev = "EV positives", 
                           ev_afp_p = "% EV positivity")) |> 
  add_overall() |> 
  as_gt()

```

Plot crude EV prevalence among notified AFP cases, per district and over time:

```{r}

# Overall AFP/NPAFP rates
data |> 
  group_by(month) |> 
  summarise(across(c("n_afp","n_npafp", "denominator"), sum)) |> 
  pivot_longer(n_afp:n_npafp) |> 
  mutate(name = factor(name, labels = c("AFP","NP-AFP")),
         r = value*1e5/denominator) |> 
  # rowwise() |> 
  # mutate(lo = Hmisc::binconf(value, denominator)[2]*1e5,
  #        hi = Hmisc::binconf(value, denominator)[3]*1e5) |>
  ggplot(aes(month, r)) + #, ymin = lo, ymax = hi
  # geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(lty = name, col = name)) + 
  guides(color = guide_legend(NULL),
         lty = guide_legend(NULL)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("black","red")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid","dashed")) + 
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.9)) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Rate per 100,000") -> p_afp_rates

# Proportion PV+
data |> 
  group_by(month) |> 
  summarise(afp = sum(n_afp),
            npafp = sum(n_npafp),
            pv = sum(n_pv_only)) |> 
  pivot_longer(npafp:pv) |> 
  mutate(name = factor(name, labels = c("Non-polio","Polio/Sabin"))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(month, value, fill = name)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey", "black")) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "sqrt") +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.9)) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "No. AFP notifications", fill = NULL) -> p_pvpos

# Annual EV+ rate by district
data |> 
  group_by(guid, year) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev/n_afp) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  right_join(shape2) |> View()
  ggplot(aes(fill = r_ev, geometry = SHAPE)) + 
  geom_sf(col = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "EV+\nPrevalence", trans = "sqrt") + 
  theme_void() -> p_dist_yr

# Longer term trend, by province
data |> 
  group_by(month, adm1_name) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = r_ev, 
             group = adm1_name, col = adm1_name, fill = adm1_name)) + 
  # geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2) + 
  geom_smooth(alpha = 0.3) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "EV+ Prevalence") -> p_mth_prov

# Correlation with population density
data |> 
  group_by(guid_pop_dens, guid) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = as.numeric(guid_pop_dens), y = r_ev)) + 
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(alpha = 0.1, lwd = 0.2, se = T) + 
  scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
  labs(x = "Log population density (/km2)", y = "EV+ Prevalence") -> p_dens_dist

p_afp_rates
p_pvpos
p_mth_prov
p_dens_dist

```

Seasonal trends
```{r}

# Seasonal trend, overall
data |> 
  group_by(month_of_year) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            `EV+` = sum(n_ev),
            `EV-` = n_afp - `EV+`,
            p_ev = `EV+`*100/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() -> data_mth

m <- max(data_mth$n_afp)/max(data_mth$p_ev) |> round()
data_mth |> 
  pivot_longer(`EV+`:`EV-`) |>
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(x = month_of_year, y = value,  fill = name)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = month_of_year, y = p_ev*m, group = 1),
            col = viridis::mako(5, end = 0.8)[3], lwd = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey","grey50")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Notified AFP cases",
                     sec.axis = sec_axis(trans=~./m,
                                         name = NULL)) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.2,0.9)) +
  labs(x = "Paralysis onset month", y = "Count", fill = NULL) -> p_moy

# Seasonal trend, by year
data |> 
  group_by(month_of_year, year) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev*100/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month_of_year, y = r_ev, 
             group = factor(year), col = factor(year))) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_smooth(se = F) + 
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "mako", end = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "mako", end = 0.8) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.9,0.85)) +
  # guides(fill = "none") +
  ylim(0,100) +
  labs(x = "Paralysis onset month", y = "% Positive", col = NULL) -> p_moy_yr

# Seasonal trend, by province
data |> 
  group_by(month_of_year, adm1_name) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month_of_year, y = r_ev, 
             group = adm1_name, col = adm1_name, fill = adm1_name)) + 
  # geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2) + 
  geom_smooth(alpha = 0.5) + 
  labs(x = NULL, y = "EV+ Prevalence") -> p_moy_prov

# Seasonal trend, by district
data |> 
  group_by(month_of_year, guid) |> 
  summarise(n_afp = sum(n_afp),
            n_ev = sum(n_ev),
            r_ev = n_ev/n_afp) |>
  ungroup() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month_of_year, y = r_ev, 
             group = guid)) + 
  # geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2) + 
  geom_smooth(alpha = 0.1, lwd = 0.2, se = F, 
              col = "steelblue") + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "EV+ Prevalence") -> p_moy_dist


p_moy
p_moy_yr
p_moy_prov
p_moy_dist

```

Overall decrease year on year, with more pronounced seasonality in 2021. 

```{r}

p_moy + p_moy_yr + 
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") -> p_seas_ev

p_seas_ev
saveRDS(p_seas_ev, here(plotdir,"ev_seas.rds"))
ggsave(here(figdir,"ev_seas.png"),
       height = 4, width = 10, bg = "white")

```

## Figure 1

```{r}

(p_afp_rates + p_pvpos)/
  (p_dist_yr + p_moy_dist) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
ggsave(here(figdir,"Figure_1.png"), 
       bg = "white",
       height = 6, width = 8, units = "in")

```

################################################################################
################################################################################
